title: Armenia's pro-West government wins election despite Russian pressure
summary_full: Prime Minister Nikol Pashinyan's Civil Contract Party secures nearly 50% of the vote, comfortably beating the other contenders.
summary_public: Prime Minister Nikol Pashinyan's Civil Contract Party secures nearly 50% of the vote, comfortably beating the other contenders.

AM.label: positive
AM.evidence: Armenia's pro-West government wins election despite Russian pressure
